CustomField.description: This Is the difference between Referral date concluded and Referral date to insurers
CustomField.formula: IF( (Referral_Date_Concluded__c - Referral_Date_to_insurers__c) > 0 , TEXT( FLOOR( Referral_Date_Concluded__c - Referral_Date_to_insurers__c ) ) & " days " & TEXT( FLOOR( MOD( (Referral_Date_Concluded__c - Referral_Date_to_insurers__c ) * 24, 24 ) ) ) & " hours " & TEXT( ROUND( MOD( (Referral_Date_Concluded__c - Referral_Date_to_insurers__c ) * 24 * 60, 60 ), 0 ) ) & " minutes", "" )
CustomField.label: Referral Time Taken
